GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [s_store_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[s_store_name@0 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100

                        GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(s_store_sk@0, ss_store_sk@0)], projection=[1, 2, 4]

                              GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9586980
                                GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(d_date_sk@0, ss_sold_date_sk@0)], projection=[2, 3]
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9586980
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9586980
                                        GpuFilterExec: predicate=d_qoy@2 = 2 AND d_year@1 = 1998, projection=[0]
                                          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=RoundRobinBatch(8), input_partitions=1
                                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=9586980
                                  GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=9586980
                                    GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_sold_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=9586980
--- memory ---
